channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [LICI] Life Insurance Corporation of India Announces Board Meeting to Consider Bonus Share Issue
item.description:
Life Insurance Corporation of India has informed the BSE that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled on April 13, 2026. The meeting will inter-alia consider and approve a proposal for issue of Bonus shares, subject to the approval of the shareholders. The trading window for dealing in the equity shares of the Corporation is closed and will remain so till 48 hours after the announcement of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Life Insurance Corporation of India to consider and approve a proposal for issue of Bonus shares
  • The decision is subject to the approval of the shareholders of the Corporation
  • Trading window for dealing in the equity shares of the Corporation is closed and will remain so till 48 hours after the announcement of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Life Insurance Corporation of India | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TFCILTD] Tourism Finance Corporation of India Ltd Issues Bonds with 9.60% and 9.65% Interest Rates
item.description:
Tourism Finance Corporation of India Ltd has issued bonds with two different ISIN numbers. The first one, NE305A09216, has a face value of INR 1,00,00,00,000 and a maturity date of 25.02.2028. It offers an annual coupon payment of 9.60%. The second one, INE305A09208, has a face value of INR 75,00,00,000 and a maturity date of 25.02.2033. It offers an annual coupon payment of 9.65%.

  • Tourism Finance Corporation of India Ltd has issued bonds with two ISIN numbers.
  • The first ISIN number, NE305A09216, has a face value of INR 1,00,00,00,000 and a maturity date of 25.02.2028.
  • The second ISIN number, INE305A09208, has a face value of INR 75,00,00,000 and a maturity date of 25.02.2033.
  • The first ISIN offers an annual coupon payment of 9.60% and the second one offers 9.65%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TOURISM FINANCE CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [CENTEXT] Century Extrusions Independent Director, Mr. Sanjeev Kishore, Resigns Effective April 7, 2026
item.description:
Mr. Sanjeev Kishore, an Independent Director of Century Extrusions Ltd, has tendered his resignation effective from the closure of business hours on 7th April, 2026. He is leaving to explore new professional opportunities in the corporate advisory space, with a special focus on supporting and advising Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs). Mr. Kishore confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation other than those mentioned.

  • Mr. Sanjeev Kishore resigns as Independent Director of Century Extrusions Ltd.
  • He is leaving to explore new opportunities in the corporate advisory space, focusing on MSMEs.
  • Mr. Kishore confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTURY EXTRUSIONS LTD. | Category: Resignation

item.title: [TFCILTD] Tourism Finance Corporation of India Ltd Appoints Compliance Officer and RTA for Q1 2026
item.description:
In accordance with Regulation 6(1) and 7(1) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, Tourism Finance Corporation of India Ltd has appointed a compliance officer and RTA for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026. Sanjay Ahuja has been appointed as the compliance officer, who is a qualified company secretary with membership number FCS-5233. He was appointed on July 31, 2013, and there has been no change in the compliance officer in the previous two quarters. MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited has been appointed as the RTA on February 12, 2014, with SEBI registration number INROO0004108. The company has not provided a reason for not appointing an RTA in the previous two quarters.

  • Tourism Finance Corporation of India Ltd appoints Sanjay Ahuja as the compliance officer for Q1 2026.
  • MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited appointed as the RTA for Tourism Finance Corporation of India Ltd for Q1 2026.
  • Sanjay Ahuja is a qualified company secretary with membership number FCS-5233.
  • No change in the compliance officer in the previous two quarters.
  • No reason provided for not appointing an RTA in the previous two quarters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TOURISM FINANCE CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [TIPCO] Non-Executive Independent Director, Mr. Jeewan Chandra, Resigns from Tipco Engineering India Ltd.
item.description:
Tipco Engineering India Ltd. has received a resignation letter from Mr. Jeewan Chandra, who has stepped down from his position as a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective from the close of business hours on 07.04.2026. The resignation is due to personal reasons. Mr. Chandra has confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation. He has also provided a detailed resignation letter, a list of other listed entities where he holds directorships, and confirmation that there are no other material reasons for his resignation. The company has disclosed the necessary information as required under the SEBI regulations.

  • Mr. Jeewan Chandra has resigned from his position as Non-Executive Independent Director of Tipco Engineering India Ltd.
  • The resignation is effective from the close of business hours on 07.04.2026.
  • The resignation is due to personal reasons.
  • Mr. Chandra has confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation.
  • The company has disclosed the necessary information as required under the SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tipco Engineering India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AUROPHARMA] Aurobindo Pharma Receives USFDA Approval for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aurobindo Pharma Limited has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) to manufacture and market Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg. These products will be launched immediately and are expected to have a market size of US$ 10.2 billion. Aurobindo Pharma, being one of the first ANDA applicants, is eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity. The products will be manufactured at Unit-IV of APL Healthcare Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.

  • Aurobindo Pharma received USFDA approval for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg
  • The products are bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to the reference listed drug (RLD), Farxiga Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, of AstraZeneca AB
  • The approved product has an estimated market size of US$ 10.2 billion
  • Aurobindo Pharma is eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity
  • The products will be manufactured at Unit-IV of APL Healthcare Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUROBINDO PHARMA LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [CENTEXT] Century Extrusions Independent Director, Mr. Sanjeev Kishore, Resigns Effective April 7, 2026
item.description:
Century Extrusions Ltd announced the resignation of Independent Director, Mr. Sanjeev Kishore, who will be stepping down from his position effective April 7, 2026. Mr. Kishore has served on the board since his appointment and has decided to resign to pursue new opportunities in the corporate advisory space, focusing on supporting Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs). He confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation beyond those mentioned. The board expressed gratitude for his contributions and extended best wishes for his future endeavors.

  • Mr. Sanjeev Kishore resigns as Independent Director of Century Extrusions Ltd.
  • Resignation effective April 7, 2026.
  • Mr. Kishore stepping down to pursue new opportunities in corporate advisory, focusing on MSMEs.
  • No other material reasons for resignation.
  • Board expresses gratitude and extends best wishes for future endeavors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTURY EXTRUSIONS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [REGENCY] Regency Fincorp Ltd. to Raise Funds via NCDs on Private Placement
item.description:
Regency Fincorp Ltd. has scheduled a Board Meeting on 10th April 2026 to consider and approve fundraising by issuing listed secured redeemable non-convertible debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis to both residents and non-residents. The company also plans to appoint a Debenture Trustee for the NCDs issue.

  • Regency Fincorp Ltd. to raise funds through NCDs issuance
  • Fundraising via private placement for both residents and non-residents
  • Appointment of Debenture Trustee for the NCDs issue

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Regency Fincorp Ltd | Category: Fundraising

item.title: [SRGHFL] SRG Housing Finance Ltd: No Encumbrances Created by Promoter & Promoter Group in FY 2025-26
item.description:
SRG Housing Finance Ltd. announced that the Promoter and Promoter Group did not create any encumbrances directly or indirectly during the Financial Year Ended 2025-26, as per the disclosure under regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The announcement was made by Mr. Vinod K. Jain, Authorised Signatory, on behalf of the Promoter and Promoter Group.

  • SRG Housing Finance Ltd. Promoter and Promoter Group made no encumbrances during FY 2025-26
  • Disclosure under regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 submitted
  • Announcement made by Mr. Vinod K. Jain, Authorised Signatory
  • Applicable to the Financial Year Ended on March 31st 2026
  • List of Promoter and Promoter Group members provided in Annexure -A

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SRG HOUSING FINANCE LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [AUROPHARMA] Aurobindo Pharma Receives USFDA Approval for Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release Tablets
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aurobindo Pharma Limited has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) to manufacture and market Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release Tablets, 5 mg/ 500 mg, 5 mg/1000 mg, 10 mg/500 mg, and 10 mg/1000 mg. These products will be launched immediately and are bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to the reference listed drug (RLD), Xigduo XR Tablets, of AstraZeneca AB. The approved product has an estimated market size of US$ 514 Million for the twelve months ending February 2026. Aurobindo Pharma, being one of the first ANDA applicants to submit a substantially complete ANDA with a paragraph IV certification, is eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity.

  • Aurobindo Pharma received USFDA approval for Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release Tablets.
  • The products are bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to the reference listed drug (RLD), Xigduo XR Tablets, of AstraZeneca AB.
  • The approved product has an estimated market size of US$ 514 Million for the twelve months ending February 2026.
  • Aurobindo Pharma is eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity.
  • The products will be manufactured at Unit-IV of APL Healthcare Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUROBINDO PHARMA LTD. | Category: USFDA
